name: archive_output
description: Archive an agent response or generated content as a new document in the knowledge base. This writes a markdown file to the specified source directory and indexes it. Useful for persisting high-quality answers, summaries, or research outputs so they become searchable knowledge.

title.description: Title for the archived document. Used as filename and frontmatter title.

content.description: The content to archive as a knowledge base document.

source_directory.description: The source directory path to save the archived document in.
